title: conyza bonariensis var. leiotheca
intro: Conyza bonariensis var. leiotheca, also known as Argentine fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conyza bonariensis var. leiotheca include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Conyza bonariensis var. leiotheca can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for use in herbal remedies.
